sentences.arabic: بَدَأَتْ مَدِينَةُ الرِّيَاضِ حَمْلَةً كَبِيرَةً لِزِرَاعَةِ الْأَشْجَارِ.
sentences.translation: Grad Rijad započeo je veliku kampanju sađenja drveća.
sentences.translationEn: The city of Riyadh started a major tree-planting campaign.

sentences.arabic: تَسْعَى الْحُكُومَةُ إِلَى تَحْسِينِ جَوْدَةِ الْهَوَاءِ فِي الْمَنَاطِقِ السَّكَنِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada nastoji poboljšati kvalitet zraka u stambenim područjima.
sentences.translationEn: The government seeks to improve air quality in residential areas.

sentences.arabic: شَارَكَ مِئَاتُ الْمُتَطَوِّعِينَ فِي غَرْسِ الشَّتَلَاتِ الصَّغِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stotine volontera učestvovalo je u sađenju malih sadnica.
sentences.translationEn: Hundreds of volunteers participated in planting small seedlings.

sentences.arabic: تَمَّ تَوْزِيعُ الْأَشْجَارِ فِي الشَّوَارِعِ وَالْحَدَائِقِ الْعَامَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Drveće je raspoređeno po ulicama i javnim parkovima.
sentences.translationEn: Trees were distributed in streets and public parks.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ هَذَا الْعَمَلُ عَلَى حِمَايَةِ الْبِيئَةِ مِنَ التَّلَوُّثِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj rad pomaže u zaštiti okoliša od zagađenja.
sentences.translationEn: This work helps protect the environment from pollution.
